error.signature: RuntimeError: Expected all tensors to be on the same device, but found at least two devices, cuda:0 and cpu!

verdict.summary: Model and input tensors are on different devices. Pipeline loaded on CPU while inputs on GPU, or mixed device_map.

dead_ends.action: Move individual tensors with .to() after each operation
dead_ends.why_fails: Manually moving tensors is error-prone and slow. Use device_map='auto' or ensure consistent device assignment.

dead_ends.action: Set CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES to empty to force CPU
dead_ends.why_fails: Forcing CPU is a workaround, not a fix. The model will run orders of magnitude slower.

workarounds.action: Use device_map='auto' in from_pretrained to handle placement automatically
Set device explicitly in pipeline constructor
workarounds.how: pipe = pipeline('text-generation', model='model', device=0)  # or device='cuda:0'

workarounds.action: Ensure input tensors match model device before forward pass
workarounds.how: inputs = tokenizer(text, return_tensors='pt').to(model.device)  # use model.device for consistency
